chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3645 - وَ رَوَى مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ كَسْبِ اَلْحَجَّامِ فَقَالَ "لاَ بَأْسَ بِهِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3645 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Abu Abdullah (as):
I asked him about the earnings of a cupper (bloodletter).
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm in it."
